name: Apple Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the peppers into small pieces.
2. Put half of the peppers and half of the vinegar in a blender and blend until smooth.
3. Repeat step 2 with the remaining peppers and vinegar.
4. Add the crushed red pepper, salt, and sugar to the blended pepper mixture.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil and add the Certo while stirring.
6. Continue boiling until the jelly thickens when dropped from a spoon at about 20-25 inches.
7. Stir in the green food coloring and transfer the jelly into jars.
8. Allow the jelly to settle, then seal with melted paraffin wax.
9. Serve over a brick of cream cheese and enjoy with crackers.
